overall.description: A nighttime journey through a rugged prairie landscape in a video game, featuring a character riding a horse with a lantern alongside a walking companion. The scene transitions from an enclosed rocky canyon to an expansive open valley with distant mountains under a starry sky.

events.description: companion NPC appears walking alongside the horse on the left side of the trail

agents.ego_description: riding a horse through a narrow rocky canyon at night, holding a lantern to illuminate the dirt path ahead

notable_agents.action: walking alongside the horse on the left side, matching the horse's pace

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face forming the left boundary of the canyon
tall pointed rock formation ahead on the trail
narrow dirt path winding through the rocky terrain
sparse bushes and dry grass on the right slope

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a solo horseback ride through a narrow rocky canyon at night. The rider holds a lantern casting a warm glow on the dirt trail. Around 7 seconds, a companion NPC appears walking on the left side, joining the journey. The canyon walls tower on both sides with sparse vegetation visible.

events.description: terrain opens up from enclosed canyon to wide valley with distant mountains becoming visible on the horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride the horse alongside the companion as the landscape opens into a wider valley with emerging mountain views

notable_agents.action: walking steadily alongside the horse on the left, maintaining pace as the terrain opens

entered.detail: mountain silhouettes visible on the horizon as the canyon opens up
gentle slopes replacing the steep canyon walls on the left
large rocks dotting the grassy terrain on the right side

segments.scene_description: The canyon gradually opens into a wider valley as the rider and companion continue forward. The steep canyon walls give way to rolling hills on the left while distant mountains emerge on the horizon. The terrain becomes grassier with scattered boulders, and the sky becomes more visible overhead.

agents.ego_description: riding across the open prairie with the companion, traversing the expansive landscape under the night sky

notable_agents.action: walking alongside the horse, silhouetted against the night landscape

entered.detail: wide open valley stretching to the horizon with layered mountain ranges in the distance
cluster of rocks on the right side of the trail in the open terrain

segments.scene_description: The journey continues across a vast open prairie with an expansive view of the valley and distant mountains. The terrain is now completely open with full sky visibility. The rider and companion maintain their steady pace across the grassland, with rocky outcrops visible on the right and mountain ranges silhouetted against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a restrictive rocky canyon that gradually expands into a vast, open prairie under a starry night sky. It begins with a solo rider on a dirt trail, the warm glow of a handheld lantern illuminating the towering canyon walls and sparse vegetation before a walking companion joins the journey from the left. As the path forward continues, the steep walls give way to rolling hills and scattered boulders, allowing the horizon to open and distant mountains to emerge. The scene then shifts into a wide valley where the terrain becomes a grassy expanse, fully revealing the night sky overhead. Finally, the camera tracks the steady pace of the pair across the open grassland, with rocky outcrops on the right and silhouetted mountain ranges stretching across the distance.
